name: @ts-doctor/discovery-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-doctor's project discovery + capability earning (RULE-012 file caps, RULE-021 capability earning, RULE-022 discovery validity). The biggest core module — an EFFECTFUL strangler-fig slice: filesystem discovery over @effect/platform FileSystem + Path with Node/in-memory Layers, typed errors on the Effect error channel (from @ts-doctor/errors-effect), plus the PURE computeCapabilities derivation.
